Hello everybody and welcome to building the machine. This video is all about the tools and software that we're going to use as part of building your Legion machine. We're going to do just a quick overview of what the different platforms are and then in the other topics we're going to walk you through getting them set up later on how to get them working for you. First one I want to talk about is acuity. It's scheduling software that's online. It allows you to create calendars, appointment types. You can get links for your clients to schedule appointments. It has a lot of automation and integration, which we're going to cover later on. It allows you to move things from one place to another. Next one I want to talk about is ClickFunnels. ClickFunnels is an amazing platform for making everything from landing and opt-in pages for your ads to actual websites to checkout funnels where people are able to make purchases. Super easy to use. It allows you to create really professional and great looking and well converting pages. You don't have to be a web programmer to use. The next one is Google Drive. Google Drive is really fantastic because it's like your Microsoft Office with the word PowerPoint. But instead it gives you an online version with docs and sheets and slides. It's free and included with a Google account. So if you don't have a Google account, get one. And then it's also going to help you connect everything. Since everything's online, we're able to make it talk to the different platform. Twilio is a way to get a phone number online, not tied to a physical phone, where you can make and receive phone calls, send and receive SMS text messages and MMS picture or video messages. It has the ability to connect with many, many other platforms. One of the platforms we connected with is FrontApp. FrontApp is a way to manage all of your communication in one single play. So you can have different channels for Facebook, Twilio, email and more. That way you have it all in one place. You don't have to go hunting into each platform to do it. You can even provide others access to it. So that way they are able to help communicate with you. So you aren't doing it solo. And you'll have to give them access to each individual account. Also some really cool advanced features in there, such as tools to automatically assign it and groups and things like that. We're going to only cover the basics. It's really fantastic. And the last one is going to be Zapier. Zapier is kind of the glue that connects everything. It's your middleman. It lets you connect all of these different platforms, set up automation, so if one thing happens, it triggers another. It lets you move data from one place to another without having to be a programmer and spending time with APIs and all. Hope you enjoyed this video. It was just a quick overview of the six different platforms we're going to cover as part of LeadGen. We have more detailed videos and the other topics on how to get these accounts set up. If you ever need anything, reach out to our support. We're happy to help. Hope you have a great rest of your day.
